mapper.select: SELECT id, name, enabled, poll_interval_seconds AS pollIntervalSeconds, query_json AS queryJson, activation_rules_json AS activationRulesJson, DATE_FORMAT(last_cursor_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastCursorTime, last_status AS lastStatus, last_error AS lastError, DATE_FORMAT(last_run_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastRunAt, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM twin_dahua_pull_task ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT id, name, enabled, poll_interval_seconds AS pollIntervalSeconds, query_json AS queryJson, activation_rules_json AS activationRulesJson, DATE_FORMAT(last_cursor_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastCursorTime, last_status AS lastStatus, last_error AS lastError, DATE_FORMAT(last_run_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastRunAt, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM twin_dahua_pull_task WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, name, enabled, poll_interval_seconds AS pollIntervalSeconds, query_json AS queryJson, activation_rules_json AS activationRulesJson, DATE_FORMAT(last_cursor_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastCursorTime, last_status AS lastStatus, last_error AS lastError, DATE_FORMAT(last_run_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastRunAt, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM twin_dahua_pull_task WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twin_dahua_pull_task (name, enabled, poll_interval_seconds, query_json, activation_rules_json) VALUES (#{name}, #{enabled}, #{pollIntervalSeconds}, #{queryJson}, #{activationRulesJson})
mapper.update: UPDATE twin_dahua_pull_task SET name = #{name}, enabled = #{enabled}, poll_interval_seconds = #{pollIntervalSeconds}, query_json = #{queryJson}, activation_rules_json = #{activationRulesJson} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE twin_dahua_pull_task SET last_cursor_time = CASE WHEN #{lastCursorTime} IS NULL OR #{lastCursorTime} = '' THEN last_cursor_time ELSE #{lastCursorTime} END, last_status = #{lastStatus}, last_error = #{lastError}, last_run_at = CASE WHEN #{lastRunAt} IS NULL OR #{lastRunAt} = '' THEN last_run_at ELSE #{lastRunAt} END WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twin_dahua_swing_record ( task_id, record_id, card_number, card_status, channel_code, channel_name, open_type, person_code, person_id, person_name, swing_time, create_time, open_result, enter_or_exit, mapping_user_id, mapping_card_no, mapping_hit, freeze_exempt_flag, raw_json ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{recordId}, #{cardNumber}, #{cardStatus}, #{channelCode}, #{channelName}, #{openType}, #{personCode}, #{personId}, #{personName}, #{swingTime}, #{createTime}, #{openResult}, #{enterOrExit}, #{mappingUserId}, #{mappingCardNo}, #{mappingHit}, #{freezeExemptFlag}, #{rawJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE card_number = VALUES(card_number), card_status = VALUES(card_status), channel_code = VALUES(channel_code), channel_name = VALUES(channel_name), open_type = VALUES(open_type), person_code = VALUES(person_code), person_id = VALUES(person_id), person_name = VALUES(person_name), swing_time = VALUES(swing_time), create_time = VALUES(create_time), open_result = VALUES(open_result), enter_or_exit = VALUES(enter_or_exit), mapping_user_id = VALUES(mapping_user_id), mapping_card_no = VALUES(mapping_card_no), mapping_hit = VALUES(mapping_hit), freeze_exempt_flag = VALUES(freeze_exempt_flag), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), ingested_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, record_id AS recordId, card_number AS cardNumber, card_status AS cardStatus, channel_code AS channelCode, channel_name AS channelName, open_type AS openType, person_code AS personCode, person_id AS personId, person_name AS personName, DATE_FORMAT(swing_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS swingTime, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, open_result AS openResult, enter_or_exit AS enterOrExit, mapping_user_id AS mappingUserId, mapping_card_no AS mappingCardNo, mapping_hit AS mappingHit, freeze_exempt_flag AS freezeExemptFlag, raw_json AS rawJson, DATE_FORMAT(ingested_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ingestedAt FROM twin_dahua_swing_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND record_id = #{recordId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, record_id AS recordId, card_number AS cardNumber, card_status AS cardStatus, channel_code AS channelCode, channel_name AS channelName, open_type AS openType, person_code AS personCode, person_id AS personId, person_name AS personName, DATE_FORMAT(swing_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS swingTime, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, open_result AS openResult, enter_or_exit AS enterOrExit, mapping_user_id AS mappingUserId, mapping_card_no AS mappingCardNo, mapping_hit AS mappingHit, freeze_exempt_flag AS freezeExemptFlag, raw_json AS rawJson, DATE_FORMAT(ingested_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ingestedAt FROM twin_dahua_swing_record WHERE 1 = 1 AND task_id = #{taskId} AND channel_code = #{channelCode} AND person_code = #{personCode} AND person_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{personName}, '%') AND open_type = #{openType} AND swing_time >= #{startTime} AND swing_time <= #{endTime} ORDER BY swing_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, channel_code AS channelCode, state, counter, DATE_FORMAT(activated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS activatedAt, DATE_FORMAT(last_swipe_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastSwipeAt, DATE_FORMAT(scheduled_exit_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS scheduledExitAt, DATE_FORMAT(debounce_until, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS debounceUntil, last_record_id AS lastRecordId, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM twin_dahua_activation_state WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND channel_code = #{channelCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twin_dahua_activation_state ( task_id, user_id, channel_code, state, counter, activated_at, last_swipe_at, scheduled_exit_at, debounce_until, last_record_id ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{channelCode}, #{state}, #{counter}, #{activatedAt}, #{lastSwipeAt}, #{scheduledExitAt}, #{debounceUntil}, #{lastRecordId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE state = VALUES(state), counter = VALUES(counter), activated_at = VALUES(activated_at), last_swipe_at = VALUES(last_swipe_at), scheduled_exit_at = VALUES(scheduled_exit_at), debounce_until = VALUES(debounce_until), last_record_id = VALUES(last_record_id), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, channel_code AS channelCode, state, counter, DATE_FORMAT(activated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS activatedAt, DATE_FORMAT(last_swipe_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastSwipeAt, DATE_FORMAT(scheduled_exit_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS scheduledExitAt, DATE_FORMAT(debounce_until, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS debounceUntil, last_record_id AS lastRecordId, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM twin_dahua_activation_state WHERE scheduled_exit_at IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_exit_at <= #{nowTime}
